productName: Ooowee - JUICED Hydrocarbon Concentrate - Khalifa Kiwi - Late Bloomer - 1g
description: A potent hybrid butane hash oil from Late Bloomer, extracted in a sealed closed-loop system by licensed techs and carefully purged to lab-tested purity. Efficient and hard-hitting, a tangy kiwi flavor, delivering a versatile, anytime balance.
